name: meem-browser-bridge
description: Chrome extension and MCP server for controlling a user's browser through a local loopback bridge.

scripts.check: node --check mcp/server.js && node --check mcp/tools.js && node --check mcp/bridge/index.js && node --check mcp/bridge/config.js && node --check mcp/bridge/http.js && node --check mcp/bridge/queue.js && node --check mcp/bridge/screenshots.js && node --check extension/background.js && node --check extension/popup.js
